nasb.text: Thus Jesse made seven of his sons pass before Samuel. But Samuel said to Jesse, “The Lord has not chosen these.”

esv.text: And Jesse made seven of his sons pass before Samuel. And Samuel said to Jesse, “The Lord has not chosen these.”

cnv.text: 耶西叫他的七個兒子都在撒母耳面前經過。但撒母耳對耶西說：“這些都不是耶和華所揀選的。”

ccb.text: 撒母耳问耶西：“你的儿子全都到齐了吗？”
